name: Bob - Multi-Repo PR Health Monitor
description: Production-grade GitHub PR health monitoring with real-time WebSocket updates and zero-config repo discovery.

SECRET_KEY.description: Flask secret key for sessions. Generate: python -c "import secrets; print(secrets.token_hex(32))"

GITHUB_TOKEN.description: Server PAT with repo + admin:org scopes (used for auto-provisioning and background scan).

GITHUB_CLIENT_ID.description: GitHub OAuth App Client ID (create at https://github.com/settings/developers).

ALLOWED_ORIGINS.description: Comma-separated list of allowed origins for CORS. Example: https://your-app.heroku.com

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection string (Heroku provides this automatically with Postgres add-on).

WEBHOOK_SECRET.description: Secret for GitHub Webhook HMAC-SHA256 verification. Set this in your GitHub Webhook config.

ASSIGNEE_USERNAME.description: GitHub username to @mention in auto-created issues (e.g. jules).

TARGET_REPOS.description: OPTIONAL whitelist. Leave empty to auto-discover all repos the user has access to. Format: owner/repo,owner/repo
